title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: When a new device is released and the app version does not support it yet, if the current date is after the device's Launch Date and the installed LM version is lower than the required version, the device home screen shows limited support. Tapping the "i" icon displays a pop-up message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
steps: 1. Ensure a new device is released that the current app version does not support.
2. Verify the current date is after the device's Launch Date.
3. Confirm the installed LM version is lower than the required version.
4. Observe the device home screen shows limited support.
5. Tap the "i" icon on the device home screen.
6. Observe the pop-up message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality."
7. Tap outside the pop-up to close it.
expected: The device home screen shows limited support. Tapping the "i" icon displays the pop-up message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
